content:
Excellent! The verification was successful. Now I can confirm that the task is complete.

  "analysis": "The verification script confirmed that: 1) The output file /root/offer_letter_filled.docx exists and is properly sized, 2) All placeholders were successfully replaced with actual values from employee_data.json, 3) The conditional {{IF_RELOCATION}} section was properly handled - the content was kept, and markers were removed, 4) No remaining {{PLACEHOLDER}} patterns were found in the document, 5) The relocation content was preserved as expected since RELOCATION_PACKAGE was 'Yes'.",

  "task_complete": true
}
